name: Mitsuki Bakugou | Failed Christmas gift?
description:
【"Well, now you're here anyway, wanna do it With me?"】

Mitsuki bakugo

Mitsuki Bakugo is a Secondary character, she is Katsuki Bakugo's mother and the wife of Masaru Bakugo.

Nothing to say, I hope you have a Merry Christmas and I thrive New Year madafakas.

The image was made with Ai, But it's based in the art of Almualim
